task_specific_assessments.content_nature: This video is a product demonstration and educational tutorial about the Inovus Medical Pyxus HD FLS trainer system. It features Dr. Elliot Street providing narrated instruction about the Pattern Cut task, equipment identification, and system setup.
task_specific_assessments.actual_task_performance: NO actual task performance is shown in this video. No gauze cutting occurs. No completion time can be measured. No penalty assessment is possible.
task_specific_assessments.why_not_scoreable: This is pure instructional/educational content with narration, presenter on-screen delivery, equipment labeling, and system introduction. It does not contain a trainee or surgeon actively performing the Pattern Cut task on the FLS trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: NOT APPLICABLE - instructional video, not a performance

confidence_rationale: Video classification is definitive. This is clearly an educational/instructional/marketing video produced by Inovus Medical featuring a presenter explaining the FLS Pattern Cut task and demonstrating the equipment. No actual surgical skill performance is recorded.
cannot_determine: Cutting accuracy or line deviation — no cutting performed
Skill level of performer — no performer conducting the task

demonstrated_techniques: Equipment identification and proper naming (Maryland dissector, endoscopic scissors, jumbo clip)
Trainer component structure and assembly (Threading Base, AZE Base, Ring Stack Base)
Safe camera positioning and overhead documentation setup
FLS trainer station setup and readiness state
verbal_cues: Dr. Elliot Street providing narrated instruction on FLS Pattern Cut task objectives
Educational explanation of Inovus Pyxus HD system capabilities
Component identification and functional purpose within the training system
common_errors_addressed: Proper instrument identification (emphasizing correct names and uses)
Correct system assembly (labeled components shown to ensure proper setup)
teaching_content.educational_value: High — this video serves as an introductory educational resource for trainees learning about the FLS Pattern Cut task and the Pyxus HD trainer system. It provides foundational knowledge about equipment, system setup, and task overview but does not demonstrate actual cutting technique or performance.

reason_not_scored: Video is instructional/educational content with narration, labeling, and presenter explanation. No actual FLS task performance is visible. Scoring criteria require observation of a trainee or surgeon actively performing the Pattern Cut task. This video does not meet that requirement.
recommendation: If a performance video of this task exists, please provide that for scoring. This instructional video is appropriate for educational purposes but cannot be evaluated using the FLS performance rubric.
